title: Nafplio, Peloponnese — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Nafplio, Peloponnese: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Nafplio is a city in Peloponnese with a population of 33,356. The romantic first capital of modern Greece with a Venetian fortress, neoclassical mansions, and sea views.

Last updated: July 10, 2026
